issues.reason: Opening the east yellow door at [11,10] lets the player route through [10,9]-[9,7] into the central chamber and then to the up stair without fighting any enemy, bypassing both the intended east-spine skeleton at [11,8] and the central zombie at [7,8]. This gives the east choice the same central rewards as the central door path with lower combat cost, so the final floor lacks mandatory battle pressure and the central route is dominated.
issues.required_change: Tax the actual east-to-central bypass while preserving the east-spine guard: add an allowed no-special enemy at [9,8] or [9,7], or otherwise relocate/add combat so every [11,10] route to [8,7], [5,7], [6,5], and the up stair crosses an enemy. Keep enemy orthogonal adjacency legal and keep tracked door/key budget unchanged.

required_changes: Add or relocate monster pressure onto the east-to-central bypass around [9,8] or [9,7] while keeping a guard on the east vertical path at [11,8]; do not change tracked door/key/resource counts.
summary: MT2 has valid dimensions, tile codes, stairs, connectivity, enemy legality, enemy adjacency, and tracked budget. It fails integration because the east route can bypass all battles, take central rewards, and dominate the intended central route.
